input: Does the Premier Checking account have a monthly maintenance fee?
retrieved_context: Premier Checking. No monthly maintenance fee. No minimum balance.

input: Is there a fee for the first overdraft each statement period?
retrieved_context: Overdraft fee: $0 for the first overdraft per statement period. $35 each thereafter, capped at 4 per day.
valid_responses: no fee for the first one

input: Are international ATM withdrawal fees waived on the Premier Travel account?
retrieved_context: Premier Travel: International ATM fees are NOT waived. $5 per transaction plus 1% of withdrawal amount.

input: Can I link the Cashback rewards card to my external savings account at another bank?
retrieved_context: External account linking is not supported for the Cashback rewards card. Linking is available only for Premier-tier accounts.
valid_responses: no, only Premier accounts can link externally
external linking is not supported on Cashback
invalid_responses: yes, all cards support external linking

retrieved_context: Mobile check deposit is available, but not 24/7. Cutoff is 9 PM ET; deposits after cutoff are processed the next business day.
valid_responses: not 24/7, the cutoff is 9 PM ET
no, there is a 9 PM cutoff
deposits after 9 PM are next business day
